title: Epic The Mod
description: A Minecraft Mod based on Epic: The Musical by Jorge Rivera-Herrans
body:
# **Epic The Mod (Beta)**
Embark on an epic odyssey based on Epic: The Musical by Jorge Rivera-Herrans

[Join our discord for updates on this Mod and exclusive behind the scenes!:](https://discord.com/invite/YKkrAfgdUY)

## **🦎 You MUST have [GeckoLib](https://modrinth.com/mod/geckolib) Installed for the Mod to Work**



## 📖 What's this mod?
Ever wanted to feel like Odysseus? Now’s your chance! Epic The Mod lets you dive headfirst into the world of Odysseus. Collect strange and haunting items, explore the dangerous Underworld, and take on gods and monsters inspired by Epic: The Musical and the Odyssey.

And the best part? This is only the beta! There's so much more to come, including boss fights with Poseidon, Zeus, Scylla, Charybdis, and other thrilling additions straight out of Epic: The Musical.

### ✅ Features so far:

_(not all these features appear in the beta version, but will come in future updates)_




**Polites**: A loyal companion who drops his signature headband, giving the "Open Arms" potion effect. While wearing it, damage is greatly reduced for both you and mobs, encouraging peaceful encounters. (Psst... he also drops pancakes..)
![Polities, Polities headband, Pancake](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/f85892f2aeeb23680c7a35c241f8649ee1ce4cc1.png)

**The Infant**: The son of none other then troys very own price hector.. You must drop him to end his life, might seem like a big sacrifice now but this is only the beggining of your journessy!
![infant](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/408b29335a6c9f821e3fbdb6bafcd04e867671bc.png)

**The Windbag**: Open it, and you’ll be launched sky-high while summoning a dramatic thunderstorm! It’s not just a fun tool but also key for defeating Poseidon!
![Windbag](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/78c6f23083cf584ef12c92442443f6f75c899045.png)

**The Underworld**: A dark and dangerous dimension where you must collect lost items to consult the Prophet. Beware, this place is no walk in the park!
![The Underworld (will change)](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/00869d9962b1e23953d8569e38b8aebade8e072f_0.webp)

**Circe**: Face off against a powerful witch who turns enemies into pigs. Defeat her to unlock the path to the Underworld.
![Circe](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d210fe99f63cf3c26e889cee69786987a04c7ca1.png)

**Lotus Eaters**: Adorable, tamable creatures with a dangerous love for Lotus fruit. Breed them, tame them, and watch out—they’re utterly dependent on their glowing treats!
![Lotus Eater and its spawn egg](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/e412fb56af866cc0b6f06a59d99e0e9661ce7836.png)

**Lotus Fruit**: A glowing, hypnotic fruit that takes over your mind when eaten. Eating one will:

Spawn more Lotus in your inventory.

Turn your world purple.

Cause uncontrollable movement.

Leave you desperately hungry for more.
![Lotus](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/b4ca2dcda1def4142e739a241c005027d0efe504.png)
![Lotus Control Effect](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/703c8626156fe2024e1f03de4c8aed0387659e1f.png)

### 🚧 Coming Soon:
This is just the beginning! Future updates will bring:

Epic boss fights with Poseidon, Zeus, Scylla, Charybdis, and more.
Additional locations and items from Epci.

## 🌟 Beta Notice:
This mod is still in beta, so expect tweaks and new features in future updates. Your feedback helps shape the journey—let us know what you think!

## Videos on this mod:
[Devlog 1](https://youtube.com/shorts/EXNGTfY2Opk?si=9RZBM9btNxOUbnE1)
[Devlog 2](https://youtube.com/shorts/i3RGHfcobDY?si=f1fjeFYXbrlZXK9g)
[Devlog 3](https://youtube.com/shorts/eVm-hVUuZLA?si=pGb1245YsFd3sfHE)


# Embark on your epic odyssey today and become your favorite legend, Odysseus! 🌊✨
